_comment: Workflow routing SSOT for dhpk. Used by userpromptsubmit-skill-hint.sh (advisory hint) and by /dhpk:do Smart Router. Patterns are ERE (extended regex). First match wins. Add specific patterns before general ones. Each intent is ONE rule whose pattern ORs the English and Chinese forms together (`<en>|<zh>`) — retune both languages in a single place. precommit is ordered before smart-commit so 'precommit' / '提交前檢查' are not swallowed by the broad 'commit' / '提交' match.

rules.pattern: (unattended|auto[- ]?run|goal +session|overnight|hands?[- ]?off).{0,30}(implement|change|openspec|opsx|session|run)|(無人值守|自動跑完|過夜跑|掛著跑).{0,20}(實作|變更|openspec|opsx)?
rules.label: unattended OpenSpec goal session

rules.pattern: (new|add(ing)?|implement(ing)?|build(ing)?|create) +.{0,40}(feature|endpoint|page|action|module|api)|(新增|加上?|寫個?|新做|實作).{0,12}(功能|特性|feature|頁面|端點|api)
rules.label: adaptive dev workflow (feature)

rules.pattern: (code +review|review +(this|the|my)? *(diff|change|patch|pr|code)|quality +check|lint +everything|(程式碼|代碼)\s*(審查|review)|(審查|review)\s*.{0,6}(diff|變更|差異|patch|pr|程式碼|代碼))
rules.label: manual code review

rules.pattern: (explore|trace|how +does|walk +through|map +the|understand +the).{0,40}(code|flow|module|architecture)|(探索|追蹤|理解|釐清).{0,12}(程式|代碼|流程|架構|呼叫|實作)
rules.label: code exploration

rules.pattern: (audit|inventory|health|stocktake).{0,40}(project|repo|codebase|harness|skill|agent)|(健診|健康檢查|體檢|盤點).{0,12}(專案|代碼|harness|skill|agent)
rules.label: project audit

rules.pattern: (deploy(ment|ing)?|publish|release|ship).{0,40}(list|manifest|files|plan)|(部署|發版|釋出|上版).{0,12}(清單|manifest|計劃)
rules.label: deploy list

rules.pattern: (tech(nical)? +spec|requirements +doc|design +doc|architecture +doc)|(技術規格|需求文件|設計文件|架構文件|tech spec)
rules.label: tech spec authoring

rules.pattern: (risk +(assess|analysis|audit)|blast +radius|impact +analysis)|(風險|影響範圍|blast radius).{0,8}(評估|分析)
rules.label: risk assessment
